title: Extraction Method C
author: SARAH SIU TZE MAK
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.iaecabe
materials: Replace the buffer with fresh buffer.

steps.title: Digestion in a proteinase K containing...
steps.instruction: Digestion in a proteinase K containing buffer following Gilbert et al. 2007 Ersmark E, Klütsch C, Chan Y, Dalén L, Sinding MHS, Gilbert T, et al. From the past to the present: Wolf phylogeography and demographic history based on the mitochondrial control region. Frontiers in ecology and the environment; 2016;4:134.

steps.title: Pre-digest all samples at 56 °C for 1 hour
steps.instruction: Pre-digest all samples at 56 °C for 1 hour. 01:00:00

steps.title: Perform a second 12-hour digest with the fresh buffer
steps.instruction: Perform a second 12-hour digest with the fresh buffer. 12:00:00

steps.title: Centrifuge samples at 6000 xG for 1 minute
steps.instruction: Centrifuge samples at 6000 xG for 1 minute. 00:01:00

steps.title: Mix 500 μl supernatant 1:8 modified...
steps.instruction: Mix 500 μl supernatant 1:8 modified PB buffer (Allentoft et al. 2015). Allentoft ME, Sikora M, Sjögren K-G, Rasmussen S, Rasmussen M, Stenderup J, et al. Population genomics of Bronze Age Eurasia. Nature. Nature Publishing Group; 2015;522:167–72.

steps.title: Centrifuge digests Monarch DNA Cleanup Columns...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge digests Monarch DNA Cleanup Columns (New England Biolabs, Massachusetts, USA).

steps.title: Elute using a wash in 17 μl buffer EB (Qiagen)
steps.instruction: Elute using a wash in 17 μl buffer EB (Qiagen). (1/2)

steps.title: Elute using a wash in 17 μl buffer EB (Qiagen)
steps.instruction: Elute using a wash in 17 μl buffer EB (Qiagen). (2/2)

steps.title: Prior to library construction, analyze small...
steps.instruction: Prior to library construction, analyze small aliquots of each extract on an Agilent 2200 TapeStation HS chip (Agilent Technologies, Palo Alto, California, USA) for fragment size estimation and molar concentration.
